meta.title: Packing Checklist
meta.subtitle: Full list of things to pack and tick off

items.name: Wallet
items.note: Cards, cash, and everyday payments.

items.name: Home keys
items.note: Easy to forget on departure day.

items.name: Smartphone
items.note: Maps, boarding passes, and communication.

items.name: Watch
items.note: Useful when you want to stay off the phone.

items.name: Passport
items.note: Required for international travel.

items.name: ID card
items.note: Useful for local or regional trips.

items.name: Booking confirmations
items.note: Hotel, tickets, reservation numbers.

items.name: Insurance documents
items.note: Keep a digital or printed copy.

items.name: Cash backup
items.note: Useful fallback when cards fail.

items.name: Visa or travel permit
items.note: Check requirements before departure.

items.name: Driver's license
items.note: Needed if renting a car.

items.name: Phone charger
items.note: The one cable you will actually need.

items.name: Powerbank
items.note: Helpful for long airport or train days.

items.name: Headphones
items.note: Transit comfort and calls.

items.name: Laptop
items.note: Take it if you plan to work while away.

items.name: Laptop charger
items.note: Easy to leave on the desk.

items.name: Plug adapter
items.note: Required in some countries and hotels.

items.name: Camera
items.note: If phone camera is not enough.

items.name: E-reader or book
items.note: Great for flights and downtime.

items.name: Toothbrush
items.note: Daily basic.

items.name: Toothpaste
items.note: Travel-size tube for cabin bags.

items.name: Deodorant
items.note: Cabin-friendly size if flying.

items.name: Shower gel
items.note: Optional if your stay already provides it.

items.name: Shampoo
items.note: Travel bottle is enough for a short trip.

items.name: Razor
items.note: Don't forget the blades.

items.name: Hair ties and clips
items.note: Essential for keeping hair managed.

items.name: Makeup essentials
items.note: Foundation, mascara, concealer — keep it minimal.

items.name: Makeup remover
items.note: Wipes or micellar water for easy removal.

items.name: Moisturizer
items.note: Travel size. Flights and AC dry out skin.

items.name: Perfume or cologne
items.note: Travel-size or a sample vial.

items.name: Contact lenses and solution
items.note: Plus a backup pair of glasses.

items.name: Shaving cream
items.note: Travel size for the bag.

items.name: Hairbrush or comb
items.note: Compact travel brush works fine.

items.name: Dry shampoo
items.note: Quick refresh between washes.

items.name: Painkillers
items.note: Basic emergency kit.

items.name: Bandages
items.note: Good for blisters and minor cuts.

items.name: Prescription medicine
items.note: Bring enough for the whole trip.

items.name: Allergy medication
items.note: Antihistamines for seasonal or food allergies.

items.name: Insect repellent
items.note: Essential for tropical and hiking destinations.

items.name: Hand sanitizer
items.note: Small bottle for transit and outdoors.

items.name: Menstrual products
items.note: Pads, tampons, or cup — pack extra.

items.name: T-shirts
items.note: Base layer for most trips.

items.name: Jeans or trousers
items.note: Choose repeatable basics.

items.name: Underwear
items.note: Adjust if laundry is available.

items.name: Socks
items.note: A few extra pairs never hurt.

items.name: Shoes
items.note: Reliable daily pair.

items.name: Sleepwear
items.note: Easy one to miss while packing fast.

items.name: Smart outfit
items.note: Useful for dinner, business, or events.

items.name: Shorts
items.note: For warm weather and casual days.

items.name: Sports bra
items.note: For active days, hiking, or the gym.

items.name: Bras
items.note: One per two days is usually fine.

items.name: Dress or skirt
items.note: Versatile for both casual and evening.

items.name: Hiking boots
items.note: Break them in before the trip.

items.name: Sandals or flip-flops
items.note: For the beach, pool, or hostel showers.

items.name: Thermal base layer
items.note: Key for cold-weather layering.

items.name: Fleece or mid-layer
items.note: Warm without bulk.

items.name: Jacket
items.note: Flexible extra layer.

items.name: Umbrella
items.note: Best for mixed or rainy forecasts.

items.name: Raincoat
items.note: Better than an umbrella for long walks.

items.name: Sunglasses
items.note: Strong sun and beach days.

items.name: Sunscreen
items.note: Especially for summer and hiking trips.

items.name: Gloves
items.note: Cold-weather comfort item.

items.name: Winter hat or beanie
items.note: You lose most heat through the head.

items.name: Sun hat
items.note: Wide brim for sun protection.

items.name: Scarf
items.note: Multi-purpose: warmth, sun cover, or fashion.

items.name: Down or puffer jacket
items.note: Packable warmth for cold destinations.

items.name: Reusable water bottle
items.note: Handy for transit and day walks.

items.name: Backpack
items.note: Useful as a day bag or personal item.

items.name: Swimwear
items.note: Pool, spa, or beach trips.

items.name: Slippers
items.note: Nice for hotels and shared bathrooms.

items.name: Travel snacks
items.note: Good for delays and long transfers.

items.name: Travel pillow
items.note: Makes long flights and bus rides tolerable.

items.name: Sleep mask and earplugs
items.note: Especially helpful in hostels or shared rooms.

items.name: Packing cubes
items.note: Keep the bag organized through the trip.

items.name: Laundry bag
items.note: Separate dirty clothes from clean ones.

items.name: Quick-dry towel
items.note: Compact microfiber for hostels and beaches.

items.name: Ski goggles
items.note: Required on the slopes.

items.name: Ski gloves
items.note: Waterproof and insulated.

items.name: Ski socks
items.note: Tall, padded, moisture-wicking.

items.name: Trekking poles
items.note: Helpful on steep or long trails.

items.name: Hiking daypack
items.note: Lightweight with water bladder support.

items.name: Beach towel
items.note: Full-size for the sand.

items.name: Snorkel or swim mask
items.note: Own gear fits better than rentals.

items.name: City map or guidebook
items.note: Offline backup for navigation.
